cards.title: CVE-2026-3823
cards.summary: [P2] Atop Technologies EHG2408 series switch has a Stack-based Buffer Overflow vulnerability with no available patch. This vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild yet. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.80)

cards.title: CVE-2026-3807
cards.summary: [P2] Tenda FH1202 has a security vulnerability with no available patch or workaround. This vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild yet. Why now: Lack of available patch (confidence: 0.70)
